data.name: Page_Subtitle
data.value: Register a passkey, then encrypt this database in place, decrypt it, export it, or hand a copy to a recipient using their X25519 pubkey.

data.name: State_Missing
data.value: Not present in OPFS — open the Todo List page first to materialize one.

data.name: Alert_AuthRequired
data.value: Authenticate above to enable encrypt / decrypt / export-for-recipient. The hint provider remembers your most recent passkey across page reloads, so the platform skips the picker on subsequent ceremonies.

data.name: Card_RecipientSubtitle
data.value: Paste the recipient's PFA-armored X25519 pubkey. Plain DBs are encrypted to the recipient (ENCRYPT mode); encrypted DBs are rekeyed (REKEY mode). The recipient must import to the same database name and register the matching key before opening.

data.name: Btn_Lock
data.value: Lock (close DB and clear cached key)

data.name: Status_Encrypted
data.value: Database encrypted in place under your passkey-derived key.

data.name: Status_Decrypted
data.value: Database decrypted in place. Slot 0 is now plain SQLite.

data.name: Status_Locked
data.value: Database closed; cached key cleared. Authenticate again to continue.

data.name: Error_PastedPubkey_BadArmor
data.value: Couldn't parse PFA armor — paste a -----BEGIN PFA PUBLIC KEY----- block.

data.name: Error_PastedPubkey_BadBase64
data.value: Inner key payload isn't valid Base64.

data.name: Error_PastedPubkey_WrongLength
data.value: Pubkey must decode to 32 bytes, got {0}.
